brand.description_en: Automobili Lamborghini S.p.A. is an Italian manufacturer of luxury sports cars and SUVs, founded by Ferruccio Lamborghini in 1963 in Sant'Agata Bolognese. Born out of a personal rivalry with Ferrari, Lamborghini has become synonymous with extreme styling, powerful naturally aspirated V10 and V12 engines, and a rebellious spirit. Now owned by Audi AG as part of the Volkswagen Group.
brand.description_zh: 兰博基尼是一家意大利豪华跑车和SUV制造商，由费鲁吉奥·兰博基尼于1963年在圣阿加塔·博洛涅塞创立。兰博基尼诞生于与法拉利的个人竞争，已成为极端造型、强劲自然吸气V10和V12发动机以及叛逆精神的代名词。现作为大众集团的一部分由奥迪AG所有。

series.description_en: The Lamborghini Countach defined the supercar era of the 1970s and 80s. Its radical scissor doors, wedge-shaped body designed by Marcello Gandini at Bertone, and mid-mounted V12 set the template for all Lamborghinis that followed. The name 'Countach' is Piedmontese dialect for an exclamation of astonishment.
series.description_zh: 兰博基尼Countach定义了70至80年代的超跑时代。其激进的剪刀门、由贝尔托内的马尔切洛·甘迪尼设计的楔形车身，以及中置V12发动机，为此后所有兰博基尼奠定了模板。'Countach'这个名字是皮埃蒙特方言，表示惊叹之声。

variants.description_en: The original Countach, pure and unadorned. Designed by Marcello Gandini and penned as the Countach prototype in 1971. The 3.9-litre V12 was mounted longitudinally ahead of the rear axle, with the gearbox forward of the engine for optimal weight distribution. No rear wing, clean lines, and at just 1,065 kg — the lightest Countach ever built.
variants.description_zh: 原始Countach，纯粹而朴素。由马尔切洛·甘迪尼设计，1971年作为Countach原型车发布。3.9升V12发动机纵向安装在后轴前方，变速箱位于发动机前方以获得最佳重量分布。没有尾翼，线条简洁，仅重1,065公斤——有史以来最轻的Countach。

variants.description_en: The most visually dramatic Countach, featuring the iconic rear wing and wide bodywork with flared arches. Engine grew to 4.75 litres. The enormous rear wing became the definitive Countach look despite being aerodynamically counterproductive. NACA ducts fed the engine with cooling air. The image that decorated bedroom walls of an entire generation.
variants.description_zh: 视觉上最具戏剧性的Countach，配备标志性尾翼和带外展轮拱的宽体套件。发动机扩大至4.75升。尽管巨大的尾翼在空气动力学上适得其反，却成为了Countach的标志性外观。NACA导管为发动机提供冷却空气。这是装饰了一整代人卧室墙壁的经典形象。

variants.description_en: Final and most powerful evolution of the Countach, designed by Horacio Pagani (then at Lamborghini) with revised bodywork by Horacio Pagani. The 5.2-litre V12 produces 455 hp. Revised nose, side strakes, and rear fascia gave it a more modern appearance. The last Countach before the Diablo era began. 657 units produced between 1988-1990.
variants.description_zh: Countach最终也是最强大的进化版，由当时在兰博基尼工作的霍拉西奥·帕加尼负责修改车身设计。5.2升V12输出455马力。修改后的车头、侧面进气口和后保险杠赋予了它更现代的外观。这是Diablo时代开始之前的最后一款Countach。1988-1990年间生产657台。

series.description_en: The Lamborghini Diablo succeeded the Countach and raised the bar for performance, becoming the first production car to exceed 200 mph (322 km/h). Designed by Marcello Gandini with revisions by Chrysler (who briefly owned Lamborghini), the Diablo evolved through numerous variants over eleven years.
series.description_zh: 兰博基尼Diablo接替Countach，将性能提升至新高度，成为第一款速度超过200英里每小时（322 km/h）的量产车。由马尔切洛·甘迪尼设计，并由克莱斯勒（曾短暂拥有兰博基尼）修改。Diablo在十一年间演变出众多变体。

variants.description_en: The original rear-wheel drive Diablo. 5.7-litre naturally aspirated V12 inherited and enlarged from the Countach. Clean styling with pop-up headlights, scissor doors, and a mid-rear engine layout. Rear-wheel drive only in initial spec, with a top speed of 325 km/h making it the fastest production car of its era. Named after a famous fighting bull owned by the Duke of Veragua.
variants.description_zh: 原始后驱版Diablo。5.7升自然吸气V12从Countach继承并扩容而来。干净的造型配备弹出式大灯、剪刀门和中置后驱布局。初始规格仅为后驱，最高速度325 km/h，使其成为那个时代最快的量产车。以维拉瓜公爵拥有的著名斗牛命名。

variants.description_en: VT stands for Viscous Traction — Lamborghini's all-wheel drive system. Power is sent to the front axle via a viscous coupling limited-slip differential. Same 492 hp V12 but significantly improved traction and drivability. Became the volume seller in the Diablo range. Available in roadster form from 1995.
variants.description_zh: VT代表粘性牵引力——兰博基尼的全轮驱动系统。通过粘性联轴器限滑差速器向前轴传递动力。搭载同款492马力V12，但大幅提升了牵引力和驾驶性。成为Diablo系列的主力销售车型。1995年起提供敞篷版本。

variants.description_en: Super Veloce — the driver's Diablo. Rear-wheel drive only, lighter than the VT, with a revised 510 hp V12 and sportier suspension tune. Updated bodywork with larger rear wing and revised front splitter. The pure driver's car of the Diablo lineup, celebrated for its balance and engagement. Later updated versions produced up to 530 hp.
variants.description_zh: Super Veloce——驾驶者的Diablo。仅后驱，比VT更轻，搭载修改后的510马力V12和更运动化的悬架调校。更新的车身配备更大尾翼和修改后的前分流器。Diablo系列中最纯粹的驾驶者用车，以其平衡性和驾驶感著称。后期更新版本最高输出530马力。

variants.description_en: Track-only homologation special for GT racing. The V12 was enlarged to 6.0 litres and tuned to 590 hp. Full roll cage, racing suspension, slick-ready tyres, and stripped interior. Produced in very limited numbers for use in the Lamborghini GTR Trophy racing series. Extremely rare collector's item.
variants.description_zh: 为GT赛车运动同质化认证的仅限赛道特别版。V12扩大至6.0升，调校至590马力。配备全套滚笼、赛车悬架、可装光头胎的轮毂和纯粹的赛车内饰。为兰博基尼GTR杯赛系列生产，数量极为有限。极为罕见的收藏品。

series.description_en: The Murciélago was the first Lamborghini developed entirely under Audi AG ownership. It evolved the Diablo's formula with a refined V12 that grew to 6.5 litres, all-wheel drive as standard, and a dramatic design featuring air intakes that open and close with engine load. Named after a famous fighting bull that survived 24 sword blows in an 1879 corrida.
series.description_zh: Murciélago是在奥迪AG收购后完全开发的第一款兰博基尼。它进化了Diablo的配方，V12发展至6.5升，标配全轮驱动，以及配备随发动机负荷开合进气口的戏剧性设计。以1879年一场斗牛比赛中经受24次剑刺仍存活的著名斗牛命名。

variants.description_en: The debut Murciélago, replacing the Diablo. 6.2-litre V12 producing 572 hp, mated to a 6-speed gated manual or automated e-gear gearbox. Signature NACA ducts on the roof feed air to the engine. Scissor doors continue the Lamborghini tradition. All-wheel drive standard. Available as a coupe and later as a roadster.
variants.description_zh: 首款Murciélago，取代Diablo。6.2升V12输出572马力，配备6速门式手动或自动e-gear变速箱。车顶的标志性NACA导管为发动机提供进气。剪刀门延续了兰博基尼传统。标配全轮驱动。提供硬顶版，后来推出敞篷版。

variants.description_en: Major mid-cycle evolution with the V12 enlarged to 6.5 litres and boosted to 640 hp. Updated nose, revised side air intakes, and restyled interior. LP designation indicates Longitudinale Posteriore (longitudinal rear) engine mounting. The 640 became the definitive Murciélago. Famous for its appearances in The Dark Knight (2008) as the Batmobile.
variants.description_zh: 重大中期改款，V12扩大至6.5升，功率提升至640马力。更新的车头、修改的侧面进气口和重新设计的内饰。LP代表纵置后置发动机安装方式。LP 640成为了Murciélago的标志性版本。因在《蝙蝠侠：黑暗骑士》（2008年）中作为蝙蝠战车出现而广为人知。

variants.description_en: The ultimate Murciélago, reviving the SV (SuperVeloce) name. 670 hp from the 6.5-litre V12, weight reduced by 100 kg through carbon fibre panels, titanium components, and deleted sound deadening. New aerodynamic package with a fixed rear wing and revised front splitter. 0-100 km/h in 3.2 seconds. Only 186 units produced, making it the most collectible Murciélago.
variants.description_zh: 终极版Murciélago，重启SV（超级速度）命名。6.5升V12输出670马力，通过碳纤维面板、钛合金部件和删除隔音材料减重100公斤。配备固定尾翼和修改后前分流器的新型空气动力学套件。0-100 km/h仅需3.2秒。仅生产186台，是最具收藏价值的Murciélago。

series.description_en: The Aventador replaced the Murciélago and introduced a new carbon fibre monocoque construction, a 6.5-litre V12 producing 700 hp in base form, and a 7-speed single-clutch ISR transmission. Named after a famous bull that fought with exceptional bravery in Zaragoza in 1993. The Aventador evolved through numerous variants culminating in the LP 780-4 Ultimae.
series.description_zh: Aventador取代Murciélago，引入了全新碳纤维单体壳结构、基础版输出700马力的6.5升V12，以及7速单离合ISR变速箱。以1993年在萨拉戈萨以非凡勇气战斗的著名斗牛命名。Aventador经过众多变体的演进，最终以LP 780-4 Ultimae收官。

variants.description_en: The debut Aventador, unveiled at the 2011 Geneva Motor Show. Carbon fibre monocoque made from forged carbon — a world first for a production car. 6.5-litre naturally aspirated V12 producing 700 hp, mated to a 7-speed ISR (Independent Shifting Rod) single-clutch transmission with 50ms gear changes. Permanent all-wheel drive. Push-rod suspension all round.
variants.description_zh: 首款Aventador，于2011年日内瓦车展揭幕。由锻造碳纤维制成的碳纤维单体壳——量产车世界首创。6.5升自然吸气V12输出700马力，配备换挡时间仅50毫秒的7速ISR（独立换挡杆）单离合变速箱。永久全轮驱动。前后推杆悬架。

variants.description_en: Track-focused SV variant with 750 hp, a 50 kg weight reduction through carbon fibre body panels and Forged Composites components. New active aerodynamics system with a rear wing that adjusts for high downforce or low drag. Revised suspension with faster responses. Front axle lift system. 0-100 km/h in 2.8 seconds. 600 coupes and 500 roadsters produced.
variants.description_zh: 赛道取向SV变体，750马力，通过碳纤维车身面板和锻造复合材料部件减重50公斤。配备新型主动空气动力学系统，尾翼可调节至高下压力或低阻力模式。改进悬架，响应更快。前轴举升系统。0-100 km/h仅需2.8秒。生产600台硬顶版和500台敞篷版。

variants.description_en: SVJ stands for SuperVeloce Jota. 770 hp V12 with active ALA 2.0 aerodynamics that can channel air through the body to reduce drag or generate downforce independently on each axle. Set the Nürburgring Nordschleife production car lap record of 6:44.97 in 2018. Rear-wheel steering system for improved agility. 900 coupes and 800 roadsters planned.
variants.description_zh: SVJ代表超级速度Jota。770马力V12配备主动ALA 2.0空气动力学系统，可将气流引导穿过车身，独立地在每个车轴上减少阻力或产生下压力。2018年创下纽博格林北环量产车圈速纪录6:44.97。后轮转向系统提升灵活性。计划生产900台硬顶版和800台敞篷版。

variants.description_en: The definitive final Aventador, combining the highest power output with a driver-focused character. 780 hp from the naturally aspirated V12 — the most powerful naturally aspirated Lamborghini V12 ever. ALA 2.0 aerodynamics from the SVJ, combined with the standard Aventador's cleaner styling. 350 coupes and 250 roadsters. The last naturally aspirated V12 Lamborghini.
variants.description_zh: 最终极的Aventador，将最高功率输出与以驾驶者为中心的特性相结合。自然吸气V12输出780马力——有史以来最强大的自然吸气兰博基尼V12。来自SVJ的ALA 2.0空气动力学与标准Aventador更简洁的造型相结合。350台硬顶版和250台敞篷版。最后一款自然吸气V12兰博基尼。

series.description_en: The Huracán replaced the Gallardo as Lamborghini's entry-level supercar, built on a new aluminium and carbon fibre spaceframe chassis shared with the Audi R8. Its 5.2-litre naturally aspirated V10 produces a glorious screaming soundtrack to match its ferocious performance. Named after a brave fighting bull from the 19th century.
series.description_zh: Huracán取代Gallardo成为兰博基尼的入门级超跑，建立在与奥迪R8共享的全新铝合金和碳纤维空间框架底盘上。5.2升自然吸气V10发出壮观的嘶吼，与其凶猛的性能相得益彰。以19世纪一头勇猛的斗牛命名。

variants.description_en: The debut Huracán. 5.2-litre naturally aspirated V10 producing 610 hp revving to 8,250 RPM with a distinctive exhaust note. New aluminium-carbon fibre hybrid chassis, 7-speed dual-clutch LDF gearbox, and standard all-wheel drive. Features the HMI interface and drive mode selector (ANIMA). Available in coupe and spyder forms.
variants.description_zh: 首款Huracán。5.2升自然吸气V10输出610马力，转速可达8,250 RPM，排气声浪独特迷人。全新铝合金-碳纤维混合底盘、7速双离合LDF变速箱和标配全轮驱动。配备HMI界面和驾驶模式选择器（ANIMA）。提供硬顶和敞篷版本。

variants.description_en: Track-focused evolution with 640 hp and Lamborghini's ALA (Aerodinamica Lamborghini Attiva) active aerodynamics. Forged Composites components reduce weight by 40 kg. ALA uses electronic flaps to actively manage airflow — reducing drag on straights or generating up to 750% more downforce in cornering. Set the Nürburgring production car record of 6:52.01 in 2017.
variants.description_zh: 赛道取向进化版，640马力，配备兰博基尼ALA（主动空气动力学）主动空气动力学系统。锻造复合材料部件减重40公斤。ALA使用电子翼片主动管理气流——在直道上减少阻力或在弯道中产生高达750%的额外下压力。2017年创下纽博格林量产车圈速纪录6:52.01。

variants.description_en: Super Trofeo Omologata — a road-legal version of the Huracán Super Trofeo racing car. Rear-wheel drive only, 640 hp, and a massive aerodynamic package with a shark fin on the roof and large rear wing generating significant downforce. Carbon-ceramic brakes standard. 75% of its components are shared with the race car. The most track-focused road Huracán.
variants.description_zh: Super Trofeo Omologata——兰博基尼Huracán超级杯赛车的可上路版本。纯后驱，640马力，配备车顶鲨鱼鳍和可产生显著下压力的大型尾翼组成的大型空气动力学套件。碳陶瓷刹车为标配。75%的部件与赛车共享。最具赛道取向的公路Huracán。

variants.description_en: New model bridging the gap between the standard Huracán EVO and the STO. Rear-wheel drive with 640 hp, new LDVI (Lamborghini Dinamica Veicolo Integrata) dynamics system, and a unique body incorporating aerodynamic elements from the STO. Longer front splitter, rear wing, and diffuser. Designed to be the most engaging road-going Huracán.
variants.description_zh: 填补标准Huracán EVO和STO之间空白的新车型。后驱，640马力，配备全新LDVI（兰博基尼综合车辆动态系统）动态系统，以及融合了STO空气动力学元素的独特车身。更长的前分流器、尾翼和扩散器。旨在打造最具驾驶乐趣的公路版Huracán。
